title: SMR Feedback
description: Single-scene SMR reward with theta and hi-beta inhibits plus a sustained reward dwell window.

threshold_window_sec.label: Adaptive window
threshold_window_sec.description: Rolling baseline window used to recompute adaptive thresholds.

clarity_at_threshold.label: Threshold clarity
clarity_at_threshold.description: Clarity value at the SMR reward threshold.

reward_target_pct.label: SMR reward time
reward_target_pct.description: Target percentage of time SMR stays above its reward threshold.

theta_inhibit_pct.label: Theta inhibit time
theta_inhibit_pct.description: Target percentage of time theta sits above its inhibit threshold.

hibeta_inhibit_pct.label: Hi-beta inhibit time
hibeta_inhibit_pct.description: Target percentage of time hi-beta sits above its inhibit threshold.
